title: ranunculus polyanthemos subsp. thomasii
intro: Ranunculus polyanthemos subsp. thomasii, also known as the meadow buttercup, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The medicinal properties of Ranunculus polyanthemos subsp. thomasii include its emetic and purgative properties, making it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of Ranunculus polyanthemos subsp. thomasii can be made into a tincture, decoction, or infusion, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potentially toxic properties.
